com.allthecolonists.configgui.title: All The Colonists Config
allthecolonists.config.gameplay.comment: Core gameplay settings for All The Colonists.
allthecolonists.config.requestsystem.com: All configurations related to the request system.
allthecolonists.config.commands.comment: All configurations related to the All The Colonists commands.
allthecolonists.config.neighborbuildingr: When placing schematics near other buildings, show existing buildings with outlines.
How close a building must be to be considered a neighbor, in blocks. -1 = intersecting, 0 = touching.
How close (in blocks) you need to be to see work orders while wearing the Build Goggles.
allthecolonists.config.colonyteamborders: Show Colony Borders in Team Colors
When true, colony borders shown with the build tool will use the colony's team color.
allthecolonists.config.nosupplyplacement: Disables supply camp placing restrictions, intended for skyworlds and similar.
allthecolonists.configuration.title: All The Colonists Config
